raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Drunk driving fatalities in California have surged by 53 percent since 2019.",
    "States that have implemented all-offender interlock laws have experienced a marked reduction in DUI-related deaths.",
    "Ignition interlock devices (IIDs) can save lives by preventing drunk driving.",
    "In 2023 alone, ignition interlock devices stopped more than 30,500 drunk drivers from starting their vehicles.",
    "California would be the only state in the nation without an IID requirement if its current pilot program were to expire."
